name: XMagicMouse
short_description: XMagicMouse is a funny and powerful mouse effect software that displays amazing animations and effects when you move your mouse or click anywhere.
detailed_description:
Important Note

XMagicMouse is NOT a live wallpaper software,it can display mouse track and effect ANYWHERE, not only on desktop wallpaper. Compatible with other software etc. Wallpaper Engine,RainWallpaper.

About XMagicMouse

XMagicMouse is a funny and powerful mouse effect software that displays amazing animations and effects when you move your mouse or click anywhere.

Features

  • Interactive simulation - molecules that react to the mouse movement and clicking.
  • Workshop supported - one click download or share mouse effects.
  • Many editing options - you can change almost every effects.
  • Support Taskbar transparent
  • Game Mode - will pause effects when you need 100% power for your games.
  • Optimization - reduced equipment requirements. Optimized code created for Low-end devices.
  • Multi-Language - includes 4 languages.
  • Compatible with other software etc. Wallpaper Engine,RainWallpaper
